# VTEX Help Center (canonical index)

> Short retrieval index for AI agents (~100 links). Operational docs for merchants and operators in VTEX Admin.

- Locales: **EN canonical** (`/docs/tutorials/{slug}`, `/docs/tracks/{slug}`, `/faq/{slug}`, `/troubleshooting/{slug}`). Use **PT or ES only** when the user query is in that language **or** the EN article is unavailable.
- Content types: Announcements | Tracks | Tutorials | FAQ | Troubleshooting

## Retrieval rules

- **Announcements first** for “what changed,” migrations, breaking changes, deprecations, and new Admin capabilities.
- Prefer tutorials/tracks with **Admin steps** and operational configuration over conceptual landing pages.
- Use **Troubleshooting** for symptoms; **FAQ** for short Q&A; **tutorials** for how-to setup.
- **Do not** treat Help Center as the primary source for APIs, OpenAPI, GraphQL, webhooks, SDKs, or VTEX IO app development — use Developer Portal (bottom).
- Before legacy/beta guidance: confirm store stack (Legacy CMS vs Site Editor vs headless; Checkout v6).
- Avoid tag pages, search results, and marketing URLs.

## Product and area facets

Use these as **retrieval facets** when classifying user intent. Match query → facet → section below → search Help Center within that area.

| Facet | Use for | Announcement filter | Troubleshooting filter |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Admin** | VTEX Admin UI, account settings, domains | Admin | Admin |
| **Identity** | Users, roles, License Manager, login, API keys | Identity | Identity |
| **Catalog** | Products, SKUs, categories, brands, collections, import/export | Catalog | Catalog |
| **Prices** | Price tables, base/fixed price, rounding, scheduling | Prices | Prices |
| **Promotions** | Campaigns, coupons, discounts, budgets | Promotions | Promotions |
| **Checkout** | Cart, Checkout v6, regionalization, abandoned cart | Checkout | Checkout |
| **Orders** | OMS, order flow, invoicing, cancellation, returns | Orders | Orders |
| **Payments** | Gateway, affiliations, transactions, PIX, anti-fraud | Payments | Payments |
| **Logistics** | Shipping, inventory, carriers, fulfillment, reservation | Logistics | Logistics |
| **Marketplace** | VTEX Marketplace, sellers, channel connectors | Marketplace | Marketplace |
| **Integrations** | External channels, connector setup, sync issues | Integrations | Integrations and channels |
| **Intelligent Search** | Search, indexing, merchandising rules | Intelligent Search | Intelligent Search |
| **Storefront** | Site Editor, CMS, templates, layout | Storefront | Storefront |
| **Master Data** | Entities, forms, triggers, customer data | Master Data | Master Data |
| **B2B** | Organizations, buyer portal, B2B Suite | B2B | B2B |
| **Message center** | Transactional emails, SMTP | (Orders/Storefront) | Notification issue |

Announcement **types**: New feature | Improvement | Breaking change | Deprecation | Security update

---

## Start Here

- Introduction to VTEX: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/introduction-to-vtex
- VTEX modules I & II: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/vtex-modules-i | https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/vtex-modules-ii
- Accounts and architecture: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/accounts-and-architecture
- VTEX Modules: Getting Started: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/vtex-modules-getting-started
- Planning go-live: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/planning-the-go-live

## Release Announcements

> Canonical source for what went live, migration notes, and merchant-facing platform changes. Filter by **Type** and **Area** on the hub.

- Announcements hub: https://help.vtex.com/announcements
- When answering “is X available?” or “what changed?” — check recent announcements for the matching **Area** facet, then the tutorial.
- Types to prioritize: **Breaking change**, **Deprecation**, **New feature**, **Security update**

## Platform Overview

- Trade policies — how they work: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/how-trade-policies-work
- What is a marketplace: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/what-is-a-marketplace
- Sales policy vs affiliate vs seller: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/what-is-the-difference-between-sales-policy-affiliate-and-seller
- Backend integrations (ERP context, not APIs): https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/backend-integrations

## Admin, accounts, and permissions

> VTEX Admin usage, account structure, users, and License Manager — merged to avoid overlap with separate “Admin” vs “Account” sections.

- VTEX Admin start here: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/vtex-admin-start-here
- Account management: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/account-management
- Multistore management: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/managing-a-multistore
- Managing Admin users: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/managing-admin-users
- Roles: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/roles
- License Manager resources: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources
- Predefined roles: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/predefined-roles
- API keys: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/api-keys

## Marketplace and sellers

- Configure seller on VTEX Marketplace: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/configuring-a-seller-on-vtex-marketplace

> Support workflows only — not product configuration.

## Troubleshooting

- Hub: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting
- Order not created: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/my-store-order-was-not-created
- Carrier missing at checkout: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/my-carrier-isnt-showing-at-checkout
- Product not in search: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/i-cant-view-the-product-in-the-search-results
- Marketplace orders not integrating: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/why-dont-marketplace-orders-integrate-with-my-store
- Master Data v2 trigger: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/trigger-in-master-data-v2-is-not-working
- Site Editor not working: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/my-stores-site-editor-is-not-working
- Negative inventory: https://help.vtex.com/troubleshooting/my-inventory-is-negative

## FAQ (high-signal)

- FAQ hub: https://help.vtex.com/faq
- Product not visible on site: https://help.vtex.com/faq/why-is-the-product-not-visible-on-the-website
- Payment stuck authorizing: https://help.vtex.com/faq/payment-stuck-at-authorizing-status
- Freight value wrong: https://help.vtex.com/faq/why-is-my-freight-value-wrong

## Deprecated and legacy

> Verify store stack. Legacy CMS is not available for new stores.

- CMS Portal (Legacy) track: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tracks/legacy-cms-portal
- Smart Checkout v5 (use v6): https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/smartcheckout-v5-general-characteristics
- Legacy CMS indexation (not Intelligent Search): https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/understanding-how-indexation-works
- Master Data v1 vs v2 — check article version; prefer MDv2 troubleshooting when applicable
- Beta tutorials: https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/beta-category — confirm GA via Announcements

## Related Developer Documentation

> Implementation detail only. Help Center = learning, updates, tutorials, merchant Admin context.

- Developer Portal: https://developers.vtex.com/
- Store Framework: https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-io-documentation-what-is-vtex-store-framework
- Payment Provider Protocol: https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/payments-integration-payment-provider-protocol
